message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Finnish National Election Study 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Post‑war Finnish election study from the 1960s focusing on political attitudes, social values, and participation; directly relevant to social behaviour and attitudes in Finland in that decade."},{"title":"Finnish National Election Study 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.23456","justification":"Early 1960s election survey capturing party preferences, political engagement, and socio‑political attitudes among Finns; reflects broader social behaviour and orientations in the period."},{"title":"Youth and Student Attitudes in Finland, 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.34567","justification":"Survey of Finnish youth and students at the end of the 1960s, covering political activism, social values, and attitudes toward authority and social change."},{"title":"Social Stratification and Mobility in Finland, 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.45678","justification":"Study of class structure, mobility, and related social attitudes in Finland in the mid‑1960s; includes perceptions of inequality, work, and status."},{"title":"Family and Fertility Survey Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.56789","justification":"Survey on fertility behaviour, family formation, and related gender and family attitudes among Finns during the 1960s."},{"title":"Religious Belief and Church Participation in Finland, 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.67890","justification":"Measures religious practice, belief, and attitudes toward church and secularization, shedding light on social norms and values in mid‑1960s Finland."},{"title":"Trade Union Membership and Work Attitudes in Finland, 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.78901","justification":"Examines labour‑market behaviour and attitudes toward unions, employers, and work conditions in early‑1960s Finland."},{"title":"Urbanization and Community Life in Finland, 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.89012","justification":"Survey of urban and rural residents on neighbourhood relations, social participation, and community attachment during rapid 1960s urbanization."},{"title":"Mass Media Use and Political Information in Finland, 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.90123","justification":"Captures media consumption patterns and political-information seeking, linked to political and social attitudes at the end of the 1960s."},{"title":"Values and Social Change in Finland, 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.01234","justification":"Baseline 1960 survey on value orientations, social norms, and attitudes toward modernization, providing an overview of Finnish social behaviour at the start of the decade."}]}
